problem id: c5ce7236
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) XOR NOT SHL(1)) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  01011100 -> 00110111
  10101010 -> 00101011
  01100111 -> 10111101
  01101000 -> 10011110
  11111110 -> 11111111
  00111010 -> 01101111
  00011111 -> 10111111
  01001101 -> 01010011
  01000111 -> 01111101
  01101110 -> 10011011

query: 01100001
predicted answer: 10111000
